server/tests/test_corpus.py :: test_default_corpus_has_named_samples
def test_default_corpus_has_named_samples():
    names = corpus_raster_names()
    assert len(names) >= 10
    assert "checkerboard" in names
    assert "noise-seeded" in names

server/tests/test_corpus.py :: test_corpus_sample_dimensions
def test_corpus_sample_dimensions():
    samples = build_default_corpus(width=40, height=30)
    assert len(samples) == len(corpus_raster_names())
    for sample in samples:
        assert sample.raster.width == 40
        assert sample.raster.height == 30
        assert sample.name
        assert sample.description

server/tests/test_corpus.py :: test_checkerboard_alternates_values
def test_checkerboard_alternates_values():
    raster = checkerboard(16, 16, cell=4)
    top_left = raster.data[0]
    adjacent_cell = raster.data[(0 * 16 + 4) * 3]
    assert top_left != adjacent_cell

server/tests/test_corpus.py :: test_noise_is_deterministic_for_seed
def test_noise_is_deterministic_for_seed():
    first = noise(8, 8, seed=99)
    second = noise(8, 8, seed=99)
    assert bytes(first.data) == bytes(second.data)

server/tests/test_corpus.py :: test_gradient_generators_cover_full_frame
def test_gradient_generators_cover_full_frame():
    generators = [
        horizontal_gradient(12, 8),
        vertical_gradient(12, 8),
        diagonal_gradient(12, 8),
        radial_gradient(12, 8),
        color_bands(12, 8),
        sine_stripes(12, 8),
        solid(4, 4, 1, 2, 3),
    ]
    for raster in generators:
        assert len(raster.data) == raster.width * raster.height * 3
